name: seccloud
description: This repo contains a synthetic-first PoC for a BYOC insider-risk substrate and thin investigation workflow.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:rust && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src tests scripts && uv run ruff format src tests scripts && eslint web/src --fix && npm run format
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check src tests scripts && uv run ruff format --check src tests scripts
scripts.generate:api-types: uv run python scripts/generate_openapi.py && openapi-typescript web/openapi.json -o web/src/api.generated.ts
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src tests scripts && prettier --write "web/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,css,html}" eslint.config.js .pre-commit-config.yaml "*.{json,md}"
scripts.dev:gateway: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_PUSH_AUTH_TOKENS='{"dev-token":{"tenant_id":"local","source":"okta","integration_id":"okta-primary"}}' cargo run --bin seccloud-gateway
scripts.dev:collector:okta: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=okta SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.dev:collector:github: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=github SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.dev:collector:gworkspace: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=gworkspace SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.dev:collector:snowflake: cd rust && RUST_LOG=info SECCLOUD_WORKSPACE=../.seccloud SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_SOURCE=snowflake SECCLOUD_FIXTURE_DIR=../examples/poc/vendor-fixtures/fixed-source-pack SECCLOUD_COLLECTOR_MODE=once cargo run --bin seccloud-collector
scripts.dev:collector:all: npm run dev:collector:okta && npm run dev:collector:github && npm run dev:collector:gworkspace && npm run dev:collector:snowflake
scripts.dev:ingest: npm run dev:collector:all && npm run dev:worker:once
